subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified above the limitations and happenings and utterances of men, befitteth the most holy and most exalted court of the Desired One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از شئونات و حوادثات و گفتارهای عباد ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودی را
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for protection, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @the power of words; of speech
